examples: Conclusion: Compound TunNiuXi sirup was proved having significant antipyretic effect.

Results: Compound TunNiuXi sirup can markedly inhibit the fever in the model anmals, the effect is similar to Asipirin.
This is done in the early evening, and later lantern in hand, you go about from tree to tree and tap into your net the insects stupefied by the sweet but fatal sirup.
